arts.ttl: Türkiye vs Wales – Match Preview and Team News
arts.sum: Wales have travelled to Kayseri to take on the Türkiye national team in the penultimate group game of Uefa Nations League. The competition may be dismissed as a series of glorified friendlies by many, but the result could have an impact on their World Cup qualifying campaign. arts.ttl: Arda Turan: Simeone, Barcelona and his coaching revolution in Turkey
arts.sum: It is late night at Eyupspor's impressive training facility and Arda Turan is working out how to mastermind another victory for his team, the surprise package in Turkey. "It is in these moments I understand Diego Simeone even better," he tells Sky Sports.
